reviews.review_title: One of the best games in Dumb Ways
reviews.review_description: Thank you PlaySide Studios for creating this masterpiece for VR, and I had a blast playing this game! Great ways to play, with minigames and score rankings! It's always dumb ways to win for me when I try to get an A! Good job!
Please add more mini games

Decided to try this, and it’s pretty good!

My only issues are that nobody’s on for multiplayer and half of the games feel hard to play gameplay wise. But otherwise, it’s nice!

But looking on the bright side, the game looked as silly as I had hoped, and the minigames are usually pretty fun!
singleplayer is boring, probably multi is funnier but none available for matching

why is there no smooth turning option? this is got to be the laziest thing to exclude from vr games. it's an instant buzzkill to go into a new vr game and only have angle locked turning that is more likely to give you a headache or trigger some kind of epilepsy than smooth turning would. Lazy developers, this game looked fun but i guess i'll never know until the devs get off their butts and actually add a feature that should be default in every game
As an older adult who loves to play games, this was actually something i really enjoyed  playing.

I’m tired of these other reviews all being 5-4 stars with non-detailed explanations like “oh wow this game is so retro!!!” when the gameplay isn’t good and the actual game is HORRIBLE, THERE ISNT A SINGLE DUMB WAY TO DIE, “oh wait it’s a dumb ways to die game tho” but in actuality all of the mini games are completely random like: feeding dolphins with a fish gun???? I thought the whole point of this franchise was to be a PSA about not doing stupid things to get yourself killed and you have to quickly prevent people from doing them, and another thing is that ITS NOT FAST PACED BUT HAS LEVELS INSTEAD, LIKE CMON GUYS ITS SUPPOSED TO BE THE MAIN COMPONENT IN THE ORIGINAL MOBILE GAME.

People seem really hung up on the branding, but since I’ve never played a “Dumb Ways” game, it doesn’t faze me. This game is simple and stupid with no depth, but sometimes this is exactly what you need.  Each game is a series of 6 or 7 minigames in a themed location, each lasting about 30 seconds. The main knock would be that most are variations on the same thing. Shoot this, slice that, throw this, catch that. When something a little different shows up, it’s not necessarily obvious how it works. The other knock is that it’s meant to be a party game, so if you’re looking for a solo player experience, this doesn’t seem like a great option. It feels as if the only point of solo play is to familiarize yourself with each minigame so you’re ready to tackle multiplayer.

reviews.review_title: Nothing like original Dumb Ways to Die…
reviews.review_description:
Disappointing app. It’s fun but it’s not DWTD.
I was expecting to at least hear the iconic DWTD song!! No silly little dudes bleeding out while dancing with moose antlers, no toasters threatening to electrify their owners…if that sounds crazy to you, that I’m disappointed that there is no death in this game, then you’ve never see the original. 
Idk what y’all were thinking when you made this as a dumb ways to die game…because it’s the complete opposite. What is “free for all “ have to do with any of it? You’re not “free” to do anything. I’d expect free for all to mean a sand box type RPG style game.
It’s like fruit ninja and other mini games.
Fast paced, quick thinking, colorful, controls are good. Mehhh. Not what I was hoping for, nor expecting.
I love playing this game!! It’s a simple game but fun!! I’m waiting on more levels!!!
Games are mostly about hurting animals in one way or the other. Even if its all imaginary i found it unpleasant. Played for 10 mins never to be touched again.
I downloaded this on a whim, certain I would probably delete it after playing for a few minutes. But I ended up having a blast. I just play the solo mini-games, but it’s such mindless fun. I love it!
I really respect the song and the game the best way it is 3d WHAT I like it thank you Dumb ways to die
This game has smoth turn. And its super duper mega fun. But its boring whitout friend. So dont purchase it alone. And try getting some friends to join

reviews.review_title: Soooo much fun with a friend!
reviews.review_description:
Me and my husband love this game! It's super cute, super fun, bright, colourful and the mini games are so funny and we have a great time!
Don't hesitate to buy it!

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun but no smooth turning
reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun but there is no smooth turn i think it would be more fun if there was a smooth turn option
Tons of silly little micro games, some more fun than others, and some have only slight differences with others. It definitely will be more fun with some friends.

Picked this up to play with my wife. We both are having a blast. If you have a friend or group of friends in VR and life goofing off, this game is a must have.

Just throwing it out there, but it would be fun for winners to get a debuff item to give another player next round. Like.. forcing someone to wear a hat that limits vision, or gloves that make hand movement for weighty/sluggish. Just to add to the chaotic nature of the games. Maybe for the next game :)

This game is pretty good but get it if you’re going to play with friends, since the servers are empty. If you want to play with public people you should wait until this game gets more popular. But anyways this game is really good and the mini games are amazing. I haven’t seen any bugs  yet but that’s a good sign! It’s a good party game. PLEASE SHARE THIS GAME WITH OTHERS!!!!!

Multiplayer is currently glitched. I had two friends I wanted to play with. One was local, the other online. It switched between who it would allow in the lobby (on the plane) and who it wouldn’t. Sometimes the person literally next to me could join the game, sometimes it was the person who was across the world. We literally couldn’t figure it out where we could all play together, totally glitched. Plus why is there no voice chat and matchmaking? Maybe a public lobby could solve matching with new people AND friends?

developer_response.body:
Hi there,
Thank you for your feedback.
Cross region friend invites will be coming in with the first free DLC update on December 9! If you are wanting to play with a friend in the same region, you can send them an invite to join a multiplayer game with you through the following steps to ensure you join the same lobby. From the Airport hub navigate to the Check In and select either the Quickplay or Friends mode, select the 'INVITE' button, select the player(s) from your contacts list you wish to invite to the lobby and press invite and your friend will join your Lobby. Just make sure that your friends have been added to your contacts.
We would also recommend joining the Dumb Ways: Free For All Discord, as you can find players there to join a game with!
There is no built-in voice chat but every supported device has integrated voice software. To do this, press the Meta button on the right hand, ensure the call/app toggle is set to call to ensure only the people in your Meta Quest voice chat can hear you. If app is selected, the voice chat will not be able to access your microphone.
Hopefully this helps! We are actively trouble shooting player issues in the official Dumb Ways: Free For All Discord if there is anything else we can support with.

reviews.review_description: Just bought this game excited to play with my wife. We got it all downloaded and got both our headsets going. I can join online sessions just fine and hers just spins loading never going anywhere. Disappointing as was only reason we got was for playing  together. Hopefully there is a solution.
It’s SOOO good I’ve even played the og mobile ones good graphics love it

reviews.review_title: I have not played  game yet but 5 stars
reviews.review_description:
Fton the rating of these game 5 🌟
 d=(^o^)=b
Super cute and fun
So good for a new game everyone play it!!!
Growing up with this game on my moms phone then to this! Child me would be astonished. 5 stars
This game I super fun but the severs are really empty
Very fun with a variety of mini games. Some do repeat but they are still very entertaining. Can’t wait for the new levels and games to come out.
this game is worth the money i recommend it highly
It is so fun. I’ve been playing with my friend every time she comes over.
The game is super fun but you need friends or you just do single player because the lobbies are super empty there is one bug I found so far but thats it

This game is more than worth it. there's 50 minigames, and 50 more coming, Making a total of 100 minigames to play. How awesome is that??? Not to mention, the animations and minigames are amazing. The graphics also. 9,4/10 game
Only have an hour or two in so far, but loving it! Recommend playing with friends. $20 is an easy yes for this much fun. 🤙
Having so much fun with my friends!
This game is awesome if you have friends! But I wouldn’t recommend it if you are looking forward to public. but once the game gets popular public would be better.
First review, this game is so much fun dude. I played it with my sisters and they loved it too. I would really recommend it for social time with friends. 10/10
